appDesc.message: See how much time you've spent on social media sites today.

tooltipToday.message: Time you were actively viewing this site today, across tabs.

tooltipFocus.message: Time you were actively viewing this page since it loaded.

tooltipSession.message: Total time this page has been open, active or not.

overlayHide.message: Hide Tab Timer on this page

popupNotTracking.message: Tab Timer isn't tracking this site yet.

popupCantTrack.message: Tab Timer can't track this page.

optionsIntro.message: Tab Timer only tracks time on sites you enable here, and everything stays on your device — nothing is ever sent off your browser.
